name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Income support scheme for farmers providing ₹6000 per year in three installments directly to bank accounts.
benefits: ₹6000 per year (₹2000 every 4 months)

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM-JAY
description: Health insurance scheme providing coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization.
benefits: Health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Housing scheme for urban poor providing financial assistance for construction or purchase of houses.
benefits: Subsidy on home loans and credit-linked subsidies

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme to address declining Child Sex Ratio and promote education of girl child.
benefits: Financial assistance for education and awareness campaigns

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh

name: National Pension Scheme (NPS)
description: Voluntary retirement savings scheme designed to enable systematic savings for old age.
benefits: Pension benefits after retirement with tax benefits

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Financial assistance to SC students studying at post-matriculation stage.
benefits: Maintenance allowance and course fees

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme primarily for workers in unorganized sector.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of ₹1000 to ₹5000 per month after 60 years

name: Skill India Mission
description: Training program for youth to enhance employability through skill development.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and placement assistance

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Rural housing scheme providing financial assistance to poor families for house construction.
benefits: ₹1.2 lakh financial assistance for house construction in plains, ₹1.3 lakh in hilly areas

name: Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: UP government scheme for girl child welfare from birth to graduation.
benefits: ₹15,000 in installments from birth to graduation

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme protecting farmers against crop loss due to natural calamities.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss, low premium rates

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM)
description: Poverty alleviation scheme promoting self-employment in rural areas.
benefits: Skill training, financial assistance, and market linkage

name: PM Scholarship Scheme for Ex-Servicemen
description: Scholarship for children and widows of ex-servicemen and ex-coast guard personnel.
benefits: ₹2,500 per month for boys, ₹3,000 per month for girls

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Facilitating bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Financial inclusion scheme providing bank accounts with benefits.
benefits: Zero balance account, RuPay debit card, accident insurance of ₹2 lakh

name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
description: Scheme providing assisted-living devices to senior citizens from BPL category.
benefits: Free wheelchairs, walking sticks, hearing aids, and other devices

name: Indira Gandhi Matritva Sahyog Yojana
description: Maternity benefit scheme for pregnant and lactating women.
benefits: ₹6,000 in three installments for first live birth

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering life cover.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance at ₹436 per year premium

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill development scheme providing training to youth.
benefits: Free training in various skills with certification and monetary rewards

name: Digital India Land Records Modernization
description: Digitization of land records for easy access and reduced disputes.
benefits: Online access to land records, reduced corruption

name: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
description: Digital literacy mission for rural India.
benefits: Free digital literacy training for rural citizens

name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Gramin
description: Sanitation program providing toilets in rural areas.
benefits: ₹12,000 incentive for toilet construction

name: Deendayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Skill training and placement program for rural youth.
benefits: Free training, placement assistance, and post-placement support

name: National Safai Karamcharis Finance Corporation
description: Financial assistance for safai karamcharis and manual scavengers.
benefits: Low-interest loans for self-employment ventures

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental insurance scheme.
benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental death/disability cover at ₹20 per year

name: National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (NREGA)
description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment in rural areas.
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment per year

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connections to BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection and first refill support
